markschemeHtml:
a. nutrition ✔

b. metabolism/respiration ✔

c. growth ✔

d. response/irritability ✔

e. excretion ✔

f. homeostasis ✔

g. reproduction ✔

Do not allow “feeding”, plants do not “feed”.

Mark the first two answers only.
